description: After an event, a concession stand manager must count their remaining inventory and report it.

nodes.task_description: Physically count all remaining inventory items in the stand.
Enter the closing counts into the inventory management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters the final counts for all items.

nodes.task_description: The system compares the closing count plus total sales against the opening count to calculate variance.

expected_outcome.expected: The system calculates a small, acceptable variance for most items.

nodes.task_description: Review the variance report and investigate any significant discrepancies.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the report and flags any items with a large variance for further review.
